objective: Plan the active-writer epoch, final-invoker fence, ambiguous-outcome custody, and lost-suffix reconciliation plane.
falsifiable_claim: Caller-authored, stale, foreign, deposed, or mismatched membership, epoch, resource, grant, root, or effect state reaches zero selected final invokers, and ambiguous outcomes remain retained for reconciliation.
exit_criteria: The full stale, foreign, deposed, caller-authored, and mismatched fence matrix reaches zero final invokers.
Crash and timeout cases retain an explicit ambiguous or lost suffix plus reconciliation duty.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M2_WRITER_FENCE_AND_LOST_SUFFIX_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Inject stale epoch, deposed writer, foreign System, caller-authored fence, mismatched grant/resource/effect, crash-after-admission, timeout, duplicate retry, and missing-suffix cases.
remaining_nonclaims: No two-node continuity or automated leader election.
Fencing is not consensus and creates no authority beyond wallet grants and sealed intents.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
